heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 22109 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2210936:346 (1st sentence).(1st sentence), .Sept. 20, 1950, ch. 958, § 664 Stat. 871The words “acting within the scope of their authority” are added for clarity and consistency in the revised title.
